hallucinations.claim: 54 MHz observations of planetary nebulae using LOFAR LBA
hallucinations.source_document: Electron temperatures derived from low-frequency observations of planetary nebulae
hallucinations.notes: The paper uses LoTSS at 144 MHz (HBA), NOT 54 MHz LBA observations. This was a serious hallucination in the initial review.

hallucinations.correct_value: 198 PNe detected in LoTSS DR3, 61 with electron temperatures determined
hallucinations.source_document: Electron temperatures derived from low-frequency observations of planetary nebulae
hallucinations.notes: Completely wrong sample size. Paper analyzed 198 PNe from LoTSS DR3, with 61 showing turnover for temperature determination.

hallucinations.correct_value: LOFAR HBA (High Band Antenna) via LoTSS survey
hallucinations.source_document: Electron temperatures derived from low-frequency observations of planetary nebulae
hallucinations.notes: LoTSS uses the High Band Antenna at 120-168 MHz (center ~144 MHz), not the Low Band Antenna which operates at lower frequencies.

hallucinations.correct_value: Detection based on LoTSS DR3 catalog plus visual inspection for 198 PNe
hallucinations.source_document: Electron temperatures derived from low-frequency observations of planetary nebulae
hallucinations.notes: The paper uses standard LoTSS detection plus visual inspection, not a simple S/N > 3 threshold as claimed.

metadata.incident_source: PN_24March review incident - serious failure requiring corrective action
